LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT KATIE CALEGARI'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFAULT IS VACATED, DEFENDANT SHALL FILE HER PROPOSED ANSWER BY JULY 21, 2011 AND MUST REIMBURSE PLAINTIFF $150.00 FOR CERTAIN EVICTION EXPENSES WITHIN 15 DAYS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR #8189
